titleStmt.title: SII 20.31: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 31. (B.K. No. 117 of 1938-39.) ĀḌŪR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing near the Kalamēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 966, Tāraṇa, Saṁkrānti, the other details being lost. It corresponds to A.D. 1044-45.

It records a gift of land to god Kāḷēśvara, probably by Barmagāvuṇḍa, when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mayūravarma of the Kadamba family was governing Pānuṁgal500 division and Daṇḍanāyaka Ēchayyabhaṭṭa was administering Pāṇḍiyūr. The record gives the goaealogical account of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarapravarddhamāna
mācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapañcama
hāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmadēcayyabhaṭṭar
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ pāṇḍiyūranāḷuttire sumadhigatapañcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
banavāsipuravarēśvara śrīmanmayūravarmmadēvaṁ pānuṁgallaynūṟarkkama rasugeyye . kanda . śrīmatka
daṁbakuḷagaganāmṛtakaranenipa caṭṭanṛpanoḷmahimōddāmateyaṁ paḍedaṁ jayadhā maṁ vibudhatara
dānadharmmaṁ bammaṁ . vritta . kōṭeya dīpadhvaja tāṁ sīgiridārisuve jagadēka dīpaṁ
kaḷaṁ balada salekaṭṭireṁbudāgadume siḍiva mannaṇeya beḷḷiya baṭṭala taṁbulaṁ jayaṁgoṁ
paḍedaṁ kadambakuḷabhūṣaṇanoḷ nijagōtradīpakaṁ . kanda . Ātana kulavadhu vinayasamēte pati
vrate guṇātisayadoḷ peṇmaṇijāte bahudharmmayutavikhyāte dayōpēte kāḷiyabbeye jagado
ḷ . Avara magaṁ kāḷiganatidhavaḷayaśaṁ rājapūjitaṁ sthiravacanaṁ vividhatarakāryyamantaṁ bhuva
najanastutyanamaḷananuvama satyaṁ . vṛtta . nuḍidaḍe karṇnanāhavadoḷindrasutaṁ pagegoṇḍa darppa
diṁ todaḻvanāṭaṁge vāyutanayaṁ keḷegoṇḍanaraṁge bennulaṁ piḍidacalakkahidhvajanudārate
yoḷsibi cārudattanendaḍe sale meḻci baṇnisuvarārggaḷarājita rājapūjyanaṁ . jitavidvidbaḷanappa
kuṁdiganṛpaṁ cāvuṇḍarāyamunnataśauryyaṁ vibhu mādigaṁ riṣiganantā nandivarmmaṁ guṇastutigeyduttamarāja
cihnamanivarmeccittu koṇḍāḍi santatamāge buturāja pūjitavisakāḷaṁge bhūcakradoḷ . kāḷiganikkuva
satrada kūḷabiyaṁ kāmadhēnu ciṁtāmaṇi salliḷeya samudramuḷidara kūḷabiyaṁ kūḷa biya madēbiya
madē biyamenikuṁ . v® . vara rāpriyanabjajaṁ kaḍidu tandiṭṭinnadēṁ celvuvettire kāḷēsvaramaṁ vici
trataraśōbhātarkyamappante vistaraḍiṁ māḍisi bēṟe kannegeṟemaṁ jīhayya bhāppendu jīṁkaripannaṁ
sale pūṇḍu kaṭṭisidane kāḷaṁ mahādāniyō . Avananujaṁ vivēkanidhi sāhasadoḷsurarājananda
naṁ kavigamakādivandijanavanditanaṁganegaṁgajaṁ mahāhavajitavīralakṣmigadhināyakaneṁndu dharātaḷaṁ
mahōtsavade taguḷdu baṇnisutamirppudu jakkiganaṁ nirantaraṁ . Enagedaṟendu banda baḍavaṁge
ṁge bhaṭaṁge gāyakaṁganupamamappa satkavige vandige vāgmige kūrttu rāgadiṁ manamosedī
dāra guṇadoḷ majebhāppene mikka cārudattanō śibiyō dinēśajanō guttanō kāḷana gandhavāraṇa
nisiṁ māṟānta vidviṣṭaranadaṭaleyaldaṇḍisalkhaṇḍisaljakkana cakraṁ sokke mārkkoṇḍarikuḷagahanō
rvvīruhōdghāṭaṇaṁ māḻpa nijāvaṣṭaṁbhadiṁ kāḷigana madagaja bāppurayendu vandijanamellaṁ kitti
dhātrige negaḻda yaśōddāmanādityavarmaṁ . parahitadoḷpu meypinayamānanamuna tikuṁ
vistaramenipagrapallavamudagrate kayyesedīva gelva koṁderaḍumidarkkidendaṟiva buddhiye
kaṇsucaritramaṁbhruyāgire majebhāppenalnegaḻdanurvvige kāḷana gandhavāraṇaṁ . Avanindaṁ kiṟi
yaṁ samastaguṇasaṁyuktaṁ jayaśrīvadhūdhavanudvrittavirōdhigindratanayaṁ vārāṁganānaṁganutsavabhōgaṁ
kalisiṁganātananuja duṣṭārisaṁhāri va ratnākara candranendu pogaḻdarssaṁ rmmanaṁ barmmanaṁ .
kadanadoḷāytavarmananidi[®ci]da vairiyanaṭṭi meṭṭiro nāṇṭi taṟidoṭṭu gelde naṁdi vija
ndasūnuveṁbudu raghusūnuveṁbudu marutsutaneṁbudu neṁbudu ka
siṁgaṇanaṁkakāṟanaṁ . sakavarṣa 966 neya tāraṇa saṁva saṁkrāṁti
muṇḍaṁ kāḷēsvara dēvargge nivēdyakke piriya keṟeya tuṁbina ®pa lari
ṟaṁgaṁ pāḍuvaṁgaṁ gaḻde Aremattarā keṟeya ṇakōḍi ri Erema pā vaṁge
Aremattaralliṁ mūḍa rgge kisu mattarondu paṟekāṟaṁga kisumatarondu
miṁtī sthāna svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhi saṁpanna
rappa śrīmatsaktipa yargge kālaṁ kaḻci koṭṭariṁtī dharmamanāvanōrvvaṁ kādūḍidātaṁge
vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷpāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirvvarmmahābrāhmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakkumidanaḷidoṁ
nā tītṛsthānadoḷanitu kavileyumananibarbrāhmaṇarumanaḷida pañcamahāpātakanakku . ślōka . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ . kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginō pārthivēndrāṁ bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadrā . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharī ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahaśrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Intu kāḷagāvuṇḍaṁ tanna dharmamanuttarōttaraṁ māḍi pāṇḍiyūraṁ barmagāvuṇḍa
māḍida mārggaventendaḍe Ūra teṁkaṇa beṭṭadaṇeya Āgnēyaṁtoṟeya ba da
sāsiradaynūṟu koṁgina maradaviṭṭageya bāviya Aḍakedōṁṭamuṁ Alliṁ paḍuva Attikeṟeya
Eraḍu mattarggaṟdeyuṁ Ā keṟeya paḍuvaṇa kōḍayaleraḍu mattarereyumalli yeraḍu mattarki
koḻvananintīyuṇbaḷiyanondokkalala
puṇyasukhamirppaṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī ©
Digital edition of SII 20.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
